channel.title: Cpp on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Cpp on Arrans github.io

item.title: WerWolv/ImHex
item.description: 🔍 A Hex Editor for Reverse Engineers, Programmers and people who value their retinas when working at 3 AM.

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: carbon-language/carbon-lang
item.description: Carbon Language’s main repository: documents, design, implementation, and related tools. (NOTE: Carbon Language is experimental; see README)

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is a declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, or JavaScript apps.

item.title: microsoft/calculator
item.description: Windows Calculator: A simple yet powerful calculator that ships with Windows

item.title: pawelsalawa/sqlitestudio
item.description: A free, open source, multi-platform SQLite database manager.

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speaker recognition using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, C/C++, Python, Kotlin, C#, Go, NodeJS, Java, Swift, Dart, JavaScript, Flutter

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: endless-sky/endless-sky
item.description: Space exploration, trading, and combat game.

item.title: eneshecan/whatsapp-for-linux
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp desktop application for Linux.

item.title: ihhub/fheroes2
item.description: fheroes2 is a recreation of Heroes of Might and Magic II game engine.

item.title: vcmi/vcmi
item.description: Open-source engine for Heroes of Might and Magic III

item.title: metacall/core
item.description: MetaCall: The ultimate polyglot programming experience.

item.title: frol/completely-unscientific-benchmarks
item.description: Naive performance comparison of a few programming languages (JavaScript, Kotlin, Rust, Swift, Nim, Python, Go, Haskell, D, C++, Java, C#, Object Pascal, Ada, Lua, Ruby)

item.title: microsoft/EdgeML
item.description: This repository provides code for machine learning algorithms for edge devices developed at Microsoft Research India.

item.title: microsoft/WindowsAppSDK-Samples
item.description: Feature samples for the Windows App SDK

item.title: natalie-lang/natalie
item.description: a work-in-progress Ruby compiler, written in Ruby and C++
